李飞飞
Li Feifei is a researcher who studied Tibetan medicine in Tibet and earned a doctorate from the California Institute of Technology.

西藏
Tibet is a region in China where Li Feifei conducted research on Tibetan medicine.

普林斯顿大学
Princeton University is an educational institution where Li Feifei completed her undergraduate studies.

加州理工学院
California Institute of Technology is an educational institution where Li Feifei obtained her doctoral degree.

伊利诺伊大学厄巴纳-香槟分校
University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign is an educational institution where Li Feifei served as an assistant professor in the Electrical and Computer Engineering department.
